# Slidez

> Slidez is an AI stylist and virtual try-on shopping app that lets people upload their photo, preview outfits on themselves, and shop confidently using AI-powered recommendations.

Slidez helps shoppers and creators try clothes, makeup, sunglasses, jewelry, and footwear virtually before buying.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://slidez-landing-page.vercel.app/)
